lg-cat: Eina per traduir contingut a altres idiomes
lg-deu: Tool zum Übersetzen des Inhalts in andere Sprachen
lg-ell: Εργαλείο για τη μετάφραση του περιεχομένου σε άλλες γλώσσες
lg-eng: Tool for translate the content to other languages
lg-fra: Outil pour traduire le contenu dans d'autres langues
lg-ita: Strumento per tradurre i contenuti in altre lingue
lg-por: Ferramenta para traduzir conteúdos para outros idiomas.
lg-spa: Herramienta de traducción de contenido a otras lenguas

lg-nolan.info: This is a sample configuration only. Since each installation may have different configurations, please use these values as a reference to create your own configuration for this tool. You can create a new record for this tool in the 'Tools Configuration' section.

lg-nolan:
You can define the URI for external API service that will use in the translation tool. External services provide different APIs and URIs that can be configured here.

 

You will need an account in the external service. Dédalo has full integration with [Apertium](https://www.apertium.org) server (open source machine translation). Other external services, like Google translation, IBM Watson, etc will need a developer integration of his API.

 

If you want to use a machine translation for developer proposes, you can talk with [Render](https://render.es), that support the Dédalo development to get a free account to his machine translation server.

 

To config the tool, create a tool config record with name: 'tool_lang'

Sample config:

 

{

 "translator_config": {

   "type": "array",

   "value": [

     {

       "key": "9Fre!ksadas132aPlsdiugJKAH",

       "uri": "https://babel.render.es/babel_engine/",

       "name": "babel"

     },

     {

       "key": "69Fgsre!kLsMyehdIuyh56JKAH",

       "uri": "https://google.com/translator",

       "name": "google_translation"

     }

   ],

   "client": false

 },

 "translator_engine": {

   "type": "array",

   "value": [

     {

       "name": "babel",

       "type": "server",

       "label": "Babel"

     },

     {

       "name": "google_translation",

       "type": "server",

       "label": "Google translator"

     },

     {

       "name": "browser_transformer",

       "type": "browser",

       "label": "Local AI translator"

     }

   ],

   "client": true,

   "default": []

 }

}
